title: Australian Kinako Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with the nutty flavor of kinako, perfect for midnight cravings. These bite-sized treats are easy to make and fun to eat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, kinako, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and water until well combined.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat about 1/2 inch of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350°F (175°C).
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the batter into the hot oil, about 1 tablespoon each.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Drizzle the sesame oil and soy sauce over the fritters and sprinkle with grated ginger.
Spoon the fritters onto a serving plate and serve hot.
If desired, serve with a side of dipping sauce made from equal parts soy sauce and honey.
Optional: For an extra crispy coating, sprinkle a pinch of sugar over the fritters before frying.
